name: Twisted Snakes Brain Puzzle
description: Untangle colorful worms in this fast-paced brain puzzle! Tap them in the right order to set them free—but watch out for collisions. With only 3 lives and a 2-minute timer, every move counts. Tackle increasingly tricky levels, earn coins, and use power-ups to keep going. Can you clear the board before time runs out? ?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
